summary: RM Inward (Purchase Entry) Bill feature testing completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and bill creation flow working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - datalist options contain span elements which is invalid HTML
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

action_items: MINOR: Fix datalist option elements in RMInward.js (lines 540-545) - remove span wrapper from option children
MINOR: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in RMInward.js for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: All 19 backend API tests passed - vendors, branches, raw materials, and rm-inward/bills endpoints working correctly
Bill creation with single and multiple line items working
Discount calculations (percentage and amount types) working correctly
Purchase entries are created automatically when bill is submitted
RM inventory is updated after bill creation
Finance user (finance@bidso.com) has proper access to RM Inward page
Vendor dropdown populates with 504 vendors from API
Branch dropdown populates with 8 branches from API
Bill date defaults to today's date correctly
Grand total calculation formula verified: sub_total - discount + tax - tds_tcs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, bill creation flow working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test bills created during testing with prefix TEST-*, UI-SUBMIT-*, UI-TEST-*
context_for_next_testing_agent: RM Inward (Purchase Entry) Bill feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Finance user can access /rm-inward page. 2) New Bill dialog opens with all form fields. 3) Vendor dropdown has 504 vendors. 4) Branch dropdown has 8 branches. 5) Bill date defaults to today. 6) Line items table with RM selection, quantity, rate, tax. 7) Add Line button adds new line items. 8) Totals section with Sub Total, Discount (% or amount), TDS/TCS, Tax Total, Grand Total. 9) Bill submission creates purchase entries and updates inventory. 10) Bills table shows all created bills with correct data. 11) Export button downloads Excel file. Test vendor: SHIPIT EXPRESS LOGISTICS (ID: 5bbff48e-d4fb-4238-98a9-0ebd22b95173). Test RM: INP_654.
